2355160.name: Fantasy Grounds - Grizelda's Guide to Ghost Hunting
2355160.description:
Grizelda's Guide to Ghost Hunting


By:
Scoundrel Game Labs

Grizelda's Guide to Ghost Hunting  is a tome packed with content that brings the incorporeal undead to life in your next 5E campaign. Discover a haunted bestiary, loads of player options, new magic items, tools for building ghost hunting guilds, and GM tools for immersing your players in ghostly adventures and investigations.
The module includes:
  • 12 new subclasses
  • 20+ Fully-illustrated monsters and NPCs
  • 5 ghost hunting guilds
  • GM tips for haunted campaigns
  • New mechanics for seances, mediums, and haunts
  • New magic items, sidekicks, feats, spells, and more
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Sandra Koch, and Travis Gray
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and the included 5E Compatible ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
